collectible.name: US M1 Steel Helmet
collectible.description:
World War II era US M1 steel helmet, the iconic "steel pot" that served American forces from 1941 through the 1980s. This example dates to 1943 production and features the characteristic olive drab finish.
The helmet consists of two parts: the outer steel shell and the inner fiber liner (M1 helmet liner). This example retains both components along with the original webbing suspension system and chin strap.
Front seam construction indicates early war production. Heat stamp visible inside the shell shows manufacturer and lot number.
